playlists.descriptionBs: Kratki videi na arapskom sa engleskim titlovima — razumljivi input za početnike. Idealno za engleski i bosanski govornike koji žele slušati pravi arapski od prvog dana.
playlists.descriptionEn: Short Arabic videos with English subtitles — comprehensible input for beginners. Perfect for English and Bosnian learners who want real Arabic from day one.
